title: Supabase password reset request fails
symptom: When attempting to reset a password using Supabase, the system returns an error stating 'Unable to process request'. This occurs during the password reset flow.
not_this_if: Using default SMTP settings for email
root_cause: The error indicates a failure in processing the password reset request, which can occur if there are issues with the SMTP configuration used for sending emails. If a custom SMTP server is misconfigured or down, it can lead to this error.
fix_steps: Check the SMTP settings in your Supabase project
Ensure that the SMTP server is operational and correctly configured
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the SMTP settings in Supabase to ensure email functionality.
